listings.title: PIONEER CS-B5000D SPEAKERS (2)
listings.body: For Sale is a beautiful pair (2) of pre-owned, but barely used, iconic PIONEER CS-B5000D 3-way speakers in great condition.  Wood finish on the tops, sides, and even the bottoms have no scratches or dings.  The Speakers are in the original box, since purchased. Pioneer’s original description of the Speakers: For the price point (These originally sold for $240) of the PIONEER CS-B5000D’s, they are solid performers: Tight and satisfying bass, convincing middles, and crisp highs. The speakers produce a great soundstage with fantastic depth, awesome separation, accuracy, and they have a warm and detailed sound, especially in reproducing voices - Outstanding imaging, especially for the money. The PIONEER CS-B5000D is a three-way bass reflex design loudspeaker that is widely praised by the audiophile press for its affordability, incredible sound, and medium-small size. The CS-B5000D comes in a beautiful oak finish that perfectly complements the most prestigious speaker stands and AV furniture, and re-voiced Sonics that rivals the sound quality of far more expensive audiophile monitor speakers. For superior performance with music or home theater media, the CS-B5000D is a prime example of PIONEER's philosophy of delivering incredible sound at an affordable price. •       Superior music performance and home theater •       High efficiency for great performance even with low power receivers •       Rear spring load terminals •       10” IMG Dynamic Balance Bass Driver for tight deep bass, wide response, and low distortion •       2-1/4” tuned port of even deeper bass •       3” Polydynamic Midrange for lifelike voices •       2-5/8” Soft Dome Tweeter for clear, detailed highs •       Anti-diffraction bezel grille system minimizes grille-edge reflections for more open, spacious, lifelike imaging Wonderful Wide Sound •	Tweeter: The tweeter in the PIONEER CS-B5000D is some of the best, most natural, soft sounding you will hear – never sounding overly bright! No other tweeter compares to the performance of the 2-5/8” soft dome tweeter. •	Midrange: The midrange speaker is 3” and it produces some of the most natural, soft sounding voices you will hear – never echo or boxy sounding! No other midrange speaker of comparable size can compete nor compare in performance. •	Woofer: The woofer is a 10” IMG Dynamic Balance Driver cones with rubber surround which is in a tune ported enclosure (approx. 2-1/4" in diameter) which makes a dramatic difference in low-frequency reproduction. The CS-B5000D is surprisingly deep, actually sounding like a 14" woofer. The bass is very tight and not "loose" or "muffled" sounding at all which is why many prefer smaller woofers. The enclosure is just large enough to let the woofer produce all the low frequencies, and the insulation is the perfect amount and type for the woofer. The CS-B5000D is superb music-listening speakers for the music enthusiast, and at the same time, they possess the wide dynamic range necessary to make them great choices for home theater systems, particularly when teamed with a powered subwoofer.” DRIVER COMPLEMENT: Tweeter •	Quantity: 1 •	Diameter: 2-5/8” •	Type: Soft Dome Tweeter Midrange •		Quantity: 1 •		Diameter: 3” •		Type: polydynamic Woofer •	Quantity: 1 •	Diameter: 10” •	Type: IMG Dynamic Balance Driver Port •	Quantity: 1 •	Diameter: 2-1/4” •	Type: Tuned ports – Front center mounted SPECIFICATIONS: •        Type: 3-way, 3 driver loudspeaker system •        Frequency Response: 40Hz to 20 kHz •        Max Music power: 120 watts •        Power Handling: 40 watts •        Crossover Frequency: 3000, 9500Hz •        Impedance: 6.3Ω •        Sensitivity: 90dB •        Bass: 1 x 10” •        Midrange: 1 x 3” •        Tweeter: 1 x 2-5/8 •        Port: 1 x 2-1/4” tuned port •        Enclosure: Bass reflex •        Dimensions: 14” W x 29-1/2” Tall x 12" Deep Weight: approximately 30 lbs. each I'm asking $100 for the pair. listings.title: Two Robotics Kits. SolarBots 8-in-1, and 2-in-1 Jungle Robot. STEM.
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. *************** This is for the sale of two different robotics kits, with a total of ten different configurations. One is unbuilt open-box/new, the other has one assembled component, while the remainder is unbuilt/new. Both kits have ALL of their necessary parts. The kits are a SolarBots 8-in-1 Solar Robot Kit, by Thames & Kosmos, and a 2-in-1 Robotikits Jungle Robot (OWI-9870) by OWIKIT. Within the SolarBots kit, the “solar gear box” has already been assembled. THIS IS A GOOD THING, as it’s the most complicated component to build in the kit, and it’s the only one that requires a screwdriver. The solar gear box is used in all eight robot configurations, but the solar gear box itself does not need any reconfiguration and can remain exactly as it is now. Based on the total number of parts in the kit, the solar gear box parts account for only 6.7% of the kit. If you’re a real stickler about DIY you can always take the solar gear box apart and assemble it again. The Jungle Robot kit has a few pieces that are no longer attached to their molding (AKA the model “sprue”), but all of the parts are included and in perfect condition. The box. . . not so great condition, but totally irrelevant to building the contents. Product description, copied from manufacturer Thames & Kosmos, for the SolarBots: 8-in-1 Solar Robot Kit: “Build unique robots that are powered by the sun — batteries not required! Using a compact solar panel, these cool little bots harness energy from the sun to power an electric motor to get moving. Build a drummer robot that marches along, beating a drum; an armadillo robot that does somersaults; a solar bug that crawls on six legs, and more! The 48-page, full-color manual guides solar power pioneers through model assembly and offers fun scientific facts about the real-life applications of solar technology. What solar-powered inventions will you dream up?” Product description, for the OWI-9870 2-in-1 Jungle Robot, copied from a Google summary: Key Features and Capabilities: • Two-in-One Design: The kit can be assembled in two ways: a walking bipedal gorilla or a climbing orangutan. • Sound Activation: Features a condenser microphone that responds to loud sounds (like a shout). • Functionality: Upon voice command, the robot activates for a pre-set time, moves across the floor or down a string, then automatically pauses to wait for the next command. • Easy Assembly: Designed for beginners, it includes a pre-assembled printed circuit board (PCB) and requires only basic hand tools, with no soldering needed. “The OWIKIT Robotikits Jungle Robot (OWI-9870) is an educational, sound-activated robot kit designed for beginners (aged 10 and up) to learn basic principles of robotic sensing and locomotion. It allows users to build a robotic ape that can either walk on two arms or climb hand-over-hand along a string or wire.”

listings.title: TinkerToy K’Nex 150-Piece Essentials Value Set #56422
listings.body: BEFORE you contact me: My zip code 10536. Please calculate your distance. CASH sales only. -------------------------- TinkerToy K’Nex 150-Piece Essentials Value Set #56422 This is the updated modern version of one of my all-time personal favorites, TinkerToy. As much as I loved the original wooden version that I grew up with (I can even still remember the distinctive smell of the wood!), I have to admit that this K’Nex version is one of the rare instances where the modern kit is actually significantly better than the original. Not only are there additional kinds of pieces, the durability and function is substantially greater (as I recall, when I was a kid I left a few of the original wooden wheels outside and they were damaged by rain). While the old wooden kit I grew up with only had about a dozen different types of pieces, this new version has 17 different kinds of pieces including some that are bendable. In just about every way that I can see, the new version is better. . . OK, maybe with the exception of the paper instructions/examples sheet. Those pages are still pretty flimsy and don’t hold up long to kids re-folding them every which way. The sheet is included, though it has a lot of mistaken folds and tears, it’s all still legible. The toy pieces are all in very nice condition! NOTE: there are two pieces missing (out of 150 total), one yellow rod (out of 16), and one red end-rod plug (out of 10). There are a few videos on Youtube of this set (not my video) if you want to see some examples of the various builds. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4TzH6ObJc90 and  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q7ObIVyBNUw

From the product description on-line: Parent’s Choice Gold Winner Fun toys include: Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Pathfinder, Fun Gears and Learn the Alphabet The ultimate sensory experience Made of high-quality wood Cleans easily with mild soap and warm water Anatex Deluxe Mini Play Cube Keeping little ones occupied for any length of time can be a challenge, but the Anatex Deluxe Mini Cube Activity Center – small enough to fit on a tabletop – is packed with plenty of things to keep kids busy. The dynamic activity panels are outfitted with the Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Fun Gears and Learn the Alphabet, all designed to play to kids’ curiosity and build their critical cognitive skills as a result. Of course, the cube is topped with a rollercoaster bead maze, an eternal favorite of waiting rooms, classrooms and home play areas. Recommended for children age 3 Years to 6 Years. Dimensions: 12L x 12W x 24H inches. Five-sided play center with activities and rollercoaster bead maze. Games include Counting Abacus and Learn the Alphabet. Compact size great for home play areas. Includes activity center and rollercoaster bead maze. Recommended for kids between 3-6 years of age. It features: Mini Rollercoaster Express, Pathfinder, Counting Abacus, Fun Gears, and Learn the Alphabet. CONDITION: this toy has been enjoyed by kids and shows wear from many hours of play. The green wire on the Rollercoaster has some lateral movement if pushed side-to-side, however, it is still solidly anchored to the wood. In fact, it’s strong enough that I was able to pick up the entire cube just by lifting it by the green wire alone. There’s almost no chance it will separate in normal play. The paint on the Learn the Alphabet tiles has deteriorated somewhat and sometimes flakes off. I’ve sprayed over it with an acrylic clear coat to help solidify it. The letters and numbers themselves are carved into the tiles, so even if the paint wears off the carved labels will still remain intact.

listings.title: Rare SEALED BOX Vintage 1977 LEGO 709 Police Boat. New-old-stock.
listings.body: ********* My zip code 10536. Please use Google to check where you are in relation to where I am to see if it's worth your travel. Cash only. ********* This is an exceptionally rare vintage 1977 LEGO 709 Police Boat still sealed in original box. Note, the plastic wrap seal has a long tear from the upper right corner, across the length of the front, to the mid-point of the left side. See photos, particularly the last few close-ups, to evaluate. As you will see, the box has never been unwrapped or opened, but technically it’s not “hermetically” sealed, its still just sealed from human contact. Box has some minor denting, particularly on corners, see photos. When assembled, the boat can float on water. This kit includes a mini-figure of a policeman. 53 pieces.
